author: Sanctuary Stream Contributors
description: Secure-by-Design church streaming control system with real-time remote management
name: sanctuary-stream

scripts.clean:all: npm run clean && rm -rf node_modules sanctuary-app/node_modules
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev:pocketbase" "npm run dev:bridge" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.dev:all: npx concurrently -n "obs,bridge,app" -c "yellow,cyan,green" "npm run mock:obs" "npm run dev:bridge" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.dev:full: npx concurrently -n "pb,obs,bridge,app" -c "blue,yellow,cyan,green" "npm run dev:pocketbase" "npm run mock:obs" "npm run dev:bridge" "npm run dev:app"
scripts.dev:pocketbase: if [ -f pocketbase/local/pocketbase ]; then PB_EXEC="./pocketbase/local/pocketbase"; else PB_EXEC="pocketbase"; fi; $PB_EXEC superuser upsert admin@local.dev admin123456 --dir pocketbase/local/pb_data && $PB_EXEC serve --http=127.0.0.1:8090 --dir pocketbase/local/pb_data
